---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a non-normative enhancement (impl, tooling, docs)
title: "[feature]: "
labels: ["feature"]
---

> **Note:** If this requires a normative change to the spec — wire format, conformance levels, JSON schemas, anything a producer or consumer must agree on — file an ASP via PR instead. See [`spec/proposals/template.md`](../../spec/proposals/template.md) and [`spec/proposals/README.md`](../../spec/proposals/README.md).

## Problem statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected, and in what scenario does this come up?

## Proposed solution

How would you like ACT to solve it? Sketch the API, CLI flag, config option, or UX you have in mind.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you discard them? Including the alternatives helps maintainers understand the design space even if your proposed solution changes during review.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art in other tools, examples from your own codebase, or anything else that helps frame the request.
